trans-unit.source: Exercise 6: Exporting Model Results for the Operations Team
trans-unit.target: Exercise 6: Exporting Model Results for the Operations Team

trans-unit.source: Characteristics of the exercise
trans-unit.target: Characteristics of the exercise

trans-unit.source: ::::{grid} 2 :::{grid-item-card} __Type of trainings exercise:__ ^^^
trans-unit.target: ::::{grid} 2 :::{grid-item-card} __Type of trainings exercise:__ ^^^

trans-unit.source: This exercise can be used in online and presence training.
trans-unit.target: This exercise can be used in online and presence training.

trans-unit.source: It can be done as a follow-along exercise or individually as a self-study.
trans-unit.target: It can be done as a follow-along exercise or individually as a self-study.

trans-unit.source: :::{grid-item-card} __Exercise Track:__
trans-unit.target: :::{grid-item-card} __Exercise Track:__

trans-unit.source: This exercise is part of the [Madagascar Anticipatory Action Cyclon Analysis Exercise Track](https://giscience.github.io/gis-training-resource-center/content/Exercise_tracks/en_mdg_aa_cyclones.html)
trans-unit.target: This exercise is part of the [Madagascar Anticipatory Action Cyclon Analysis Exercise Track](https://giscience.github.io/gis-training-resource-center/content/Exercise_tracks/en_mdg_aa_cyclones.html)

trans-unit.source: ::::{grid} 2 :::{grid-item-card} __Estimated time demand for the exercise__ ^^^
trans-unit.target: ::::{grid} 2 :::{grid-item-card} __Estimated time demand for the exercise__ ^^^

trans-unit.source: [Zonal Statistics](https://giscience.github.io/gis-training-resource-center/content/Wiki/en_qgis_raster_basic_wiki.html)
trans-unit.target: [Zonal Statistics](https://giscience.github.io/gis-training-resource-center/content/Wiki/en_qgis_raster_basic_wiki.html)

trans-unit.source: [Intersection](https://giscience.github.io/gis-training-resource-center/content/Wiki/en_qgis_spatial_joins_wiki.html#join-attributes-by-location-summary)
trans-unit.target: [Intersection](https://giscience.github.io/gis-training-resource-center/content/Wiki/en_qgis_spatial_joins_wiki.html#join-attributes-by-location-summary)

trans-unit.source: [Projections](/content/Wiki/en_qgis_projections_wiki.md)
trans-unit.target: [Projections](/content/Wiki/en_qgis_projections_wiki.md)

trans-unit.source: [Buffer](/content/Wiki/en_qgis_projections_wiki.md)
trans-unit.target: [Buffer](/content/Wiki/en_qgis_projections_wiki.md)

trans-unit.source: [Clip](/content/Wiki/en_qgis_projections_wiki.md)
trans-unit.target: [Clip](/content/Wiki/en_qgis_projections_wiki.md)

trans-unit.source: [Automation](https://giscience.github.io/gis-training-resource-center/content/Wiki/en_qgis_automation_wiki.html)
trans-unit.target: [Automation](https://giscience.github.io/gis-training-resource-center/content/Wiki/en_qgis_automation_wiki.html)

trans-unit.source: :::{card} :class-card: sd-border-1 sd-shadow-none __Aim of the exercise:__ ^^^ Aina, the GIS expert at the Malagasy Red Cross (CRM), is preparing for the upcoming cyclone season. She wants to improve her team’s ability to act quickly once a storm is forecasted by automating key analyses in QGIS. These include estimating exposed populations, identifying impacted services like health and education, and assessing whether health posts can be reached from key warehouses within a critical 10-hour window. The goal is to prepare an end-to-end analysis and visualization workflow that can support fast, data-driven anticipatory action before a cyclone makes landfall.
trans-unit.target: :::{card} :class-card: sd-border-1 sd-shadow-none __Aim of the exercise:__ ^^^ Aina, the GIS expert at the Malagasy Red Cross (CRM), is preparing for the upcoming cyclone season. She wants to improve her team’s ability to act quickly once a storm is forecasted by automating key analyses in QGIS. These include estimating exposed populations, identifying impacted services like health and education, and assessing whether health posts can be reached from key warehouses within a critical 10-hour window. The goal is to prepare an end-to-end analysis and visualization workflow that can support fast, data-driven anticipatory action before a cyclone makes landfall.

trans-unit.source: Instructions for the trainers
trans-unit.target: Instructions for the trainers

trans-unit.source: :::{dropdown} __Trainers Corner__
trans-unit.target: :::{dropdown} __Trainers Corner__

trans-unit.source: Prepare the training
trans-unit.target: Prepare the training

trans-unit.source: Take the time to familiarise yourself with the exercise and the provided material.
trans-unit.target: Take the time to familiarise yourself with the exercise and the provided material.

trans-unit.source: Prepare a white-board. It can be either a physical whiteboard, a flip-chart, or a digital whiteboard (e.g. Miro board) where the participants can add their findings and questions.
trans-unit.target: Prepare a white-board. It can be either a physical whiteboard, a flip-chart, or a digital whiteboard (e.g. Miro board) where the participants can add their findings and questions.

trans-unit.source: Before starting the exercise, make sure everybody has installed QGIS and has downloaded __and unzipped__ the data folder.
trans-unit.target: Before starting the exercise, make sure everybody has installed QGIS and has downloaded __and unzipped__ the data folder.

trans-unit.source: Check out [How to do trainings?](https://giscience.github.io/gis-training-resource-center/content/Trainers_corner/en_how_to_training.html#how-to-do-trainings) for some general tips on training conduction
trans-unit.target: Check out [How to do trainings?](https://giscience.github.io/gis-training-resource-center/content/Trainers_corner/en_how_to_training.html#how-to-do-trainings) for some general tips on training conduction

trans-unit.source: Conduct the training
trans-unit.target: Conduct the training

trans-unit.source: __Introduction:__
trans-unit.target: __Introduction:__

trans-unit.source: Introduce the idea and aim of the exercise.
trans-unit.target: Introduce the idea and aim of the exercise.

trans-unit.source: Provide the download link and make sure everybody has unzipped the folder before beginning the tasks.
trans-unit.target: Provide the download link and make sure everybody has unzipped the folder before beginning the tasks.

trans-unit.source: __Follow-along:__
trans-unit.target: __Follow-along:__

trans-unit.source: Show and explain each step yourself at least twice and slow enough so everybody can see what you are doing, and follow along in their own QGIS-project.
trans-unit.target: Show and explain each step yourself at least twice and slow enough so everybody can see what you are doing, and follow along in their own QGIS-project.

trans-unit.source: Make sure that everybody is following along and doing the steps themselves by periodically asking if anybody needs help or if everybody is still following.
trans-unit.target: Make sure that everybody is following along and doing the steps themselves by periodically asking if anybody needs help or if everybody is still following.

trans-unit.source: Be open and patient to every question or problem that might come up. Your participants are essentially multitasking by paying attention to your instructions and orienting themselves in their own QGIS-project.
trans-unit.target: Be open and patient to every question or problem that might come up. Your participants are essentially multitasking by paying attention to your instructions and orienting themselves in their own QGIS-project.

trans-unit.source: __Wrap up:__
trans-unit.target: __Wrap up:__

trans-unit.source: Leave time for any issues or questions concerning the tasks at the end of the exercise.
trans-unit.target: Leave time for any issues or questions concerning the tasks at the end of the exercise.

trans-unit.source: Leave some time for open questions.
trans-unit.target: Leave some time for open questions.

trans-unit.source: Available data
trans-unit.target: Available data

trans-unit.source: __Download all datasets here, save the folder on your computer and unzip the file.__ :::
trans-unit.target: __Download all datasets here, save the folder on your computer and unzip the file.__ :::

trans-unit.source: **Context – Aina Supports Decision Makers**
trans-unit.target: **Context – Aina Supports Decision Makers**

trans-unit.source: After producing maps and visuals, Aina often gets requests from the operations team:
trans-unit.target: After producing maps and visuals, Aina often gets requests from the operations team:

trans-unit.source: _“Can you send us the data in table format?”_
trans-unit.target: _“Can you send us the data in table format?”_

trans-unit.source: Instead of exporting these tables manually each time, Aina wants to automate this step within her model — ensuring that every run of the model produces clear, ready-to-use data files.
trans-unit.target: Instead of exporting these tables manually each time, Aina wants to automate this step within her model — ensuring that every run of the model produces clear, ready-to-use data files.

trans-unit.source: In this task, you’ll help Aina extend her existing model to export selected layers.
trans-unit.target: In this task, you’ll help Aina extend her existing model to export selected layers.

trans-unit.source: We will join the following layers step by step:
trans-unit.target: We will join the following layers step by step:

trans-unit.source: `admin2_health_affected_pct`: Contains the **total number of health facilities**, the **number of affected health facilities**, and the **percentage of affected health facilities**.
trans-unit.target: `admin2_health_affected_pct`: Contains the **total number of health facilities**, the **number of affected health facilities**, and the **percentage of affected health facilities**.

trans-unit.source: `admin2_education_affected_pct`: Contains the **total number of education facilities**, the **number of affected education facilities**, and the **percentage of affected education facilities**.
trans-unit.target: `admin2_education_affected_pct`: Contains the **total number of education facilities**, the **number of affected education facilities**, and the **percentage of affected education facilities**.

trans-unit.source: `exposed_population`: Contains the **total population per district** and the **exposed population** from the zonal statistics step.
trans-unit.target: `exposed_population`: Contains the **total population per district** and the **exposed population** from the zonal statistics step.

trans-unit.source: Tasks
trans-unit.target: Tasks

trans-unit.source: Open your model
trans-unit.target: Open your model

trans-unit.source: Open `Estimate_Exposed_Population_Health_Education`
trans-unit.target: Open `Estimate_Exposed_Population_Health_Education`

trans-unit.source: Save a new version as:
trans-unit.target: Save a new version as:

trans-unit.source: Join Health and Education data into one layer
trans-unit.target: Join Health and Education data into one layer

trans-unit.source: In the **Algorithms**, search for `Join Attributes by Field Value`.
trans-unit.target: In the **Algorithms**, search for `Join Attributes by Field Value`.

trans-unit.source: Add a description: `Joindre santé et éducation dans une seule couche par ADM2`
trans-unit.target: Add a description: `Joindre santé et éducation dans une seule couche par ADM2`

trans-unit.source: Configure the algorithm as follows:
trans-unit.target: Configure the algorithm as follows:

trans-unit.source: **Input Layer**: `admin2_health_affected` (select from **Algorithm Output**)
trans-unit.target: **Input Layer**: `admin2_health_affected` (select from **Algorithm Output**)

trans-unit.source: **Input Layer 2**: `admin2_education_affected` (select from **Algorithm Output**)
trans-unit.target: **Input Layer 2**: `admin2_education_affected` (select from **Algorithm Output**)

trans-unit.source: **Table field**:
trans-unit.target: **Table field**:

trans-unit.source: **Table field 2**:
trans-unit.target: **Table field 2**:

trans-unit.source: **Layer 2 fields to copy**: Leave empty (all fields will be copied)
trans-unit.target: **Layer 2 fields to copy**: Leave empty (all fields will be copied)

trans-unit.source: **Join type**: Take attributes of the first matching feature only (one-to-one)
trans-unit.target: **Join type**: Take attributes of the first matching feature only (one-to-one)

trans-unit.source: Leave output as **Model Output**
trans-unit.target: Leave output as **Model Output**

trans-unit.source: Configuration de l’opération : joindre les données de santé et d’éducation par le champ `ADM2_PCODE` afin de combiner les résultats dans une seule couche. ::: 3. Join the result with the population data Now join the result of the previous step (health + education) to the **exposed population** data.
trans-unit.target: Configuration de l’opération : joindre les données de santé et d’éducation par le champ `ADM2_PCODE` afin de combiner les résultats dans une seule couche. ::: 3. Join the result with the population data Now join the result of the previous step (health + education) to the **exposed population** data.

trans-unit.source: Add a second `Join Attributes by Field Value` algorithm to the model
trans-unit.target: Add a second `Join Attributes by Field Value` algorithm to the model

trans-unit.source: Add a description: `Joindre les données de population avec les indicateurs santé et éducation`
trans-unit.target: Add a description: `Joindre les données de population avec les indicateurs santé et éducation`

trans-unit.source: Configure the algorithm as follows:
trans-unit.target: Configure the algorithm as follows:

trans-unit.source: **Input Layer**: `exposed_population` (select from **Algorithm Output** of the Zonal Statistics step)
trans-unit.target: **Input Layer**: `exposed_population` (select from **Algorithm Output** of the Zonal Statistics step)

trans-unit.source: **Input Layer 2**: Output from Step 2 (health + education)
trans-unit.target: **Input Layer 2**: Output from Step 2 (health + education)

trans-unit.source: **Table field**:
trans-unit.target: **Table field**:

trans-unit.source: **Table field 2**:
trans-unit.target: **Table field 2**:

trans-unit.source: **Layer 2 fields to copy**: *(Enter the following field names exactly as shown — comma-separated, no spaces)*
trans-unit.target: **Layer 2 fields to copy**: *(Enter the following field names exactly as shown — comma-separated, no spaces)*

trans-unit.source: **Join type**: Take attributes of the first matching feature only (one-to-one)
trans-unit.target: **Join type**: Take attributes of the first matching feature only (one-to-one)

trans-unit.source: Leave output as **Model Output**
trans-unit.target: Leave output as **Model Output**

trans-unit.source: Configuration de l’opération : joindre les données de population avec les indicateurs de santé et d’éducation. :::
trans-unit.target: Configuration de l’opération : joindre les données de population avec les indicateurs de santé et d’éducation. :::

trans-unit.source: ::::{tip} Where to find the column names Open the **attribute tables** of the outputs `health_total_per_admin2`, `sum_exposed_healthsites_POI`, and `admin2_health_affected_pct` in QGIS. Look at the **column headers** to find the exact names of the fields you want to copy. :::: ::::{warning} Invisible spaces will break the join If a column name like `count_health_total` has an invisible trailing space, the join will silently fail. Always copy field names **directly from the attribute table** to avoid errors. ::::
trans-unit.target: ::::{tip} Where to find the column names Open the **attribute tables** of the outputs `health_total_per_admin2`, `sum_exposed_healthsites_POI`, and `admin2_health_affected_pct` in QGIS. Look at the **column headers** to find the exact names of the fields you want to copy. :::: ::::{warning} Invisible spaces will break the join If a column name like `count_health_total` has an invisible trailing space, the join will silently fail. Always copy field names **directly from the attribute table** to avoid errors. ::::

trans-unit.source: Export results to a spreadsheet
trans-unit.target: Export results to a spreadsheet

trans-unit.source: In the **Processing Toolbox**, search for `Export to spreadsheet` and double-click to open.
trans-unit.target: In the **Processing Toolbox**, search for `Export to spreadsheet` and double-click to open.

trans-unit.source: Add a description: `Exporter les données de population, d'éducation et de santé dans un seul tableau`
trans-unit.target: Add a description: `Exporter les données de population, d'éducation et de santé dans un seul tableau`

trans-unit.source: Configure the tool as follows:
trans-unit.target: Configure the tool as follows:

trans-unit.source: **Input Layer**: Select the output of Step 3 from **Algorithm Output**
trans-unit.target: **Input Layer**: Select the output of Step 3 from **Algorithm Output**

trans-unit.source: **Destination spreadsheet**:
trans-unit.target: **Destination spreadsheet**:

trans-unit.source: Click `OK` to add it to the model. Once you run the model, this step will automatically generate a spreadsheet with all relevant indicators ready for the operations team!
trans-unit.target: Click `OK` to add it to the model. Once you run the model, this step will automatically generate a spreadsheet with all relevant indicators ready for the operations team!

trans-unit.source: Exporter tous les indicateurs (population, santé, éducation) vers un tableau unique au format tableur. :::
trans-unit.target: Exporter tous les indicateurs (population, santé, éducation) vers un tableau unique au format tableur. :::

trans-unit.source: **Validate and Save Your Extended Model**
trans-unit.target: **Validate and Save Your Extended Model**

trans-unit.source: Click the ✔️ **Validate Model** button to check for errors.
trans-unit.target: Click the ✔️ **Validate Model** button to check for errors.

trans-unit.source: Save again to: **`Estimate_Exposed_Population_Health_Education.model3`**
trans-unit.target: Save again to: **`Estimate_Exposed_Population_Health_Education.model3`**

trans-unit.source: **Run the model**
trans-unit.target: **Run the model**

trans-unit.source: Click the ▶️ **Run** button in the top-right corner of the Graphical Modeler window.
trans-unit.target: Click the ▶️ **Run** button in the top-right corner of the Graphical Modeler window.

trans-unit.source: **Input:**
trans-unit.target: **Input:**

trans-unit.source: Click on the three dots for each input dataset and select the correct input:
trans-unit.target: Click on the three dots for each input dataset and select the correct input:

trans-unit.source: `Cyclone Track` → select the GeoJSON of the storm path (e.g. `Harald_2025_Track.geojson`)
trans-unit.target: `Cyclone Track` → select the GeoJSON of the storm path (e.g. `Harald_2025_Track.geojson`)

trans-unit.source: `Population Raster` → select the WorldPop raster file
trans-unit.target: `Population Raster` → select the WorldPop raster file

trans-unit.source: `Admin Boundaries` → select the Admin 2 layer (e.g. `MDG_adm2.gpkg`)
trans-unit.target: `Admin Boundaries` → select the Admin 2 layer (e.g. `MDG_adm2.gpkg`)

trans-unit.source: `Health Facilities` → select the point dataset for health sites
trans-unit.target: `Health Facilities` → select the point dataset for health sites

trans-unit.source: `Education Facilities` → select the point dataset for schools
trans-unit.target: `Education Facilities` → select the point dataset for schools

trans-unit.source: **Output:**
trans-unit.target: **Output:**

trans-unit.source: Save all output layers in the output folder and use the names below.
trans-unit.target: Save all output layers in the output folder and use the names below.

trans-unit.source: `admin2_health_affacted` ->
trans-unit.target: `admin2_health_affacted` ->

trans-unit.source: `admin2_education_affected` ->
trans-unit.target: `admin2_education_affected` ->

trans-unit.source: `cyclone_harald_buffer` ->
trans-unit.target: `cyclone_harald_buffer` ->

trans-unit.source: `exposed_population_sum` ->
trans-unit.target: `exposed_population_sum` ->

trans-unit.source: `exposure_indicators_spreadsheet` ->
trans-unit.target: `exposure_indicators_spreadsheet` ->

trans-unit.source: Click `Run` to execute the full model.
trans-unit.target: Click `Run` to execute the full model.

trans-unit.source: ::::{tab-item} Graphic Modeler
trans-unit.target: ::::{tab-item} Graphic Modeler

trans-unit.source: Vue du modeleur graphique avec l’étape d’exportation vers un tableau ajoutée au modèle. ::: :::: ::::{tab-item} Run Model Configuration :::{figure} /fig/fr_MDG_AA_intermediate_result_model_algorythms_task6_export_spreadsheet_run_configurations.PNG
trans-unit.target: Vue du modeleur graphique avec l’étape d’exportation vers un tableau ajoutée au modèle. ::: :::: ::::{tab-item} Run Model Configuration :::{figure} /fig/fr_MDG_AA_intermediate_result_model_algorythms_task6_export_spreadsheet_run_configurations.PNG

trans-unit.source: Fenêtre de configuration pour exécuter le modèle avec l’option d’export vers un tableau. ::: :::: ::::{tab-item} Model Output :::{figure} /fig/fr_MDG_AA_intermediate_result_model_algorythms_task6_export_spreadsheet_results_AT.PNG
trans-unit.target: Fenêtre de configuration pour exécuter le modèle avec l’option d’export vers un tableau. ::: :::: ::::{tab-item} Model Output :::{figure} /fig/fr_MDG_AA_intermediate_result_model_algorythms_task6_export_spreadsheet_results_AT.PNG

trans-unit.source: Résultats finaux du modèle exportés dans un tableau prêt à être utilisé. ::: :::: :::::
trans-unit.target: Résultats finaux du modèle exportés dans un tableau prêt à être utilisé. ::: :::: :::::
